scripts.test: pnpm -r test && node --test tools/sync-reward-codes.test.mjs && python -m unittest tools/sync_manifest_test.py
scripts.audit: pnpm archive:audit && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && node tools/check-web-performance-budgets.mjs
scripts.cf:deploy: pnpm --filter @guardian-nexus/api run deploy && pnpm --filter @guardian-nexus/web run deploy
